title: ctenopterella lastii
intro: Ctenopterella lastii, also known as Last's fern, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is a medicinal plant native to tropical Asia, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. Ctenopterella lastii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine.
